meaning: n.末底改(基督教<<圣经>>故事人物,Esther的堂兄,从Haman手中救出犹太人)
examples: And they told to Mordecai Esther's words.
But Mordecai bowed not, nor did him reverence.
My Uncle Mordecai heard them and he told me to alert the king.
Lee Mordecai, 26, from Swansea, was remanded in custody until September 24, when he will appear at Swansea Crown Court.
The last Cubs starter to begin a season with at least nine straight quality starts was Mordecai "Three Finger" Brown in 1908.
